context.description: Introductory philosophical prose sets up the book's purpose: to raise the reader's central question and address doubts about the strange phenomena discussed. It ends with a transition into the main text and a closing wish for enjoyment.
normalization_notes: German source text translated into English control-language values.
Book title inferred from file name.

rows.paragraph_text: The text reflects on what stands before us and frames the book's purpose as prompting the reader to confront a central question. It states that doubts about the strange phenomena mentioned will be dispelled, then turns toward the beginning of the work.
